# Gautam Kumar — Full Profile

- Name: Gautam Kumar

## Summary
Gautam Kumar is a Full-Stack Developer who has solo-shipped 4 production SaaS applications with AI integration, combining React, Node.js, TypeScript, Python, and LLM-powered features. He completed a [Microsoft Elevate × AICTE internship](https://gautam-kr.vercel.app/experience) and has experience with real-time systems and microservice architecture.

## Education
- **Jagannath University, Jaipur** — B.Tech in Computer Science (Jul 2023 – Jul 2027)

## Work Experience

### [Microsoft Elevate × AICTE](https://gautam-kr.vercel.app/experience) — Emerging Technologies Intern (Jan 2026 – Feb 2026)
- Built Satark-AI, a deepfake detection platform using Microsoft Azure, FastAPI, PyTorch, and SpeechBrain
- Designed a 3-tier microservice architecture with an AI-powered audio forensics engine
- [Certificate](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1ZDyJBjn9AgeQEfppbwgAeAyoPS5ADgwn/view)

### [Edunet Foundation (AICTE × IBM SkillsBuild)](https://gautam-kr.vercel.app/experience) — Frontend Web Development Intern (Aug 2025 – Sep 2025)
- Engineered responsive UIs achieving 95+ Lighthouse score and 100% cross-browser compatibility
- Optimized frontend asset loading resulting in 30% reduction in initial page load time
- [Certificate](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1_ZL-2ghlWanTam-9ftSBHnTtZb6Im3vu/view)

### [YHills](https://gautam-kr.vercel.app/experience) — Full-Stack Web Development Intern (Mar 2024 – Jun 2024)
- Developed scalable full-stack application using MERN Stack with RESTful APIs
- Built dynamic React.js frontend components improving user engagement by 25%
- [Certificate](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1iPIKxZXLxYtsQKYTnrVtYLo-inKc17Gg/view)

## Projects

### [InterviewMinds](https://interviewminds.vercel.app)
- GitHub: [github.com/theunstopabble/InterviewMinds](https://github.com/theunstopabble/InterviewMinds)
- [Portfolio Page](https://gautam-kr.vercel.app/projects/interviewminds)
- Type: Production-grade AI Mock Interview Platform
- Description: Production-grade platform with 91 features across 18 phases. AI-powered interviews via Groq Llama 3.3-70b, real-time ML video proctoring (face-api.js + TensorFlow.js), CRDT collaborative code editor with three-way merge, WebRTC video calls with STUN/TURN + SFU, sandboxed code execution via Piston API, and multimodal voice tone analysis. Built as Turborepo monorepo with 81 service modules, 38 route files, and 7 MongoDB models.
- Tech Stack: React 18, TypeScript, Node.js 20, Express, MongoDB, Redis, Groq LLM (Llama 3.3-70b), face-api.js, TensorFlow.js, WebRTC, Socket.IO, GraphQL (Apollo), BullMQ, Clerk Auth, Turborepo, Docker

### [SwadKart](https://swadkart.vercel.app)
- GitHub: [github.com/theunstopabble/SwadKart](https://github.com/theunstopabble/SwadKart)
- [Portfolio Page](https://gautam-kr.vercel.app/projects/swadkart)
- Type: Multi-Vendor Food Delivery Platform
- Description: Production-grade platform with 4-role ecosystem (Admin, Restaurant, Delivery, Customer). AI chatbot (Groq LLM) for food recommendations, voice search in English & Hindi, biometric auth (WebAuthn fingerprint/FaceID), real-time GPS delivery tracking via Socket.io, Razorpay payments (UPI/Cards/Wallets/COD), gamification (streaks, SwadCoins, badges), group ordering with bill splitting, PWA with offline support. Features 30+ API routes, 14 Mongoose schemas, fraud detection, rate limiting, GDPR compliance.
- Tech Stack: React 19, Vite, Redux Toolkit 2, Node.js 22, Express 5, MongoDB, Redis, Socket.IO, Razorpay, Firebase Auth, WebAuthn, Groq SDK, Tailwind CSS, PWA, i18next

### [Satark-AI](https://satark-deepfake.vercel.app)
- GitHub: [github.com/theunstopabble/Satark-AI](https://github.com/theunstopabble/Satark-AI)
- [Portfolio Page](https://gautam-kr.vercel.app/projects/satark-ai)
- Type: Deepfake Detection & Speaker Verification Platform
- Description: Multi-model deepfake detection as Turborepo microservices monorepo. Detects synthetic audio via Wav2Vec2 + MFCC spectral forensics, deepfake images via NVIDIA NIM (Llama 3.2-90B Vision) through Cloudflare Worker proxy, and verifies speaker identity using ECAPA-TDNN voice biometrics with 192-dim embeddings and cosine similarity matching (threshold: 0.75). PWA with real-time microphone monitoring, analytics dashboard, PDF report exports. Per-user scoped speaker isolation.
- Tech Stack: React 18, TypeScript, Vite, FastAPI (Python), PyTorch, Hono (Node.js), PostgreSQL, Drizzle ORM, NVIDIA NIM, Cloudflare Workers, Turborepo, Docker, ECAPA-TDNN, Wav2Vec2, SpeechBrain

### [TexFolio](https://texfolio.vercel.app)
- GitHub: [github.com/theunstopabble/TexFolio](https://github.com/theunstopabble/TexFolio)
- [Portfolio Page](https://gautam-kr.vercel.app/projects/texfolio)
- Type: AI-Powered LaTeX Resume Builder SaaS
- Description: Combines real LaTeX PDF rendering with LLM intelligence. LangGraph multi-agent resume coach (4-stage: Content, Impact, Format, ATS scoring), LinkedIn PDF import via Llama 3.3, FAANG-ready templates, drag-and-drop editor, Organizations with RBAC (Owner/Admin/Editor/Viewer), BullMQ async PDF generation with progress tracking, distributed Redis rate limiting, Razorpay payments, GDPR compliance (data export + PII anonymization). Sandboxed LaTeX compilation using spawn.
- Tech Stack: React 19, Vite, TypeScript, Hono (Node.js), MongoDB, Redis, BullMQ, LangChain, LangGraph, NVIDIA NIM, Groq, Clerk Auth, Razorpay, Tailwind CSS, Docker, pdflatex

## Full Skills & Expertise

### Languages
TypeScript, JavaScript (ES6+), Python, Java (DSA), SQL

### Frontend
React 18/19, Next.js 16, Vite, Redux Toolkit, Zustand, Tailwind CSS, Shadcn UI, TanStack Query, Framer Motion, React Hook Form, Monaco Editor, Recharts, Leaflet.js

### Backend
Node.js 22, Express 5, Hono v4, FastAPI, Socket.IO 4, GraphQL (Apollo Server), BullMQ, REST APIs, WebRTC

### Databases
MongoDB (Mongoose 8/9), PostgreSQL (Drizzle ORM), Redis (ioredis)

### AI & Machine Learning
Groq (Llama 3.3-70b), NVIDIA NIM (Llama 3.2-90B Vision), LangChain, LangGraph, TensorFlow.js, face-api.js, PyTorch, SpeechBrain, Wav2Vec2, ECAPA-TDNN, Azure Speech SDK, Google Gemini, Xenova Transformers

### DevOps & Infrastructure
Docker, Docker Compose, Turborepo, GitHub Actions CI/CD, Vercel, Render, Cloudflare Workers, Nginx, Prometheus, Sentry

### Authentication & Security
Clerk, Firebase Auth, WebAuthn (@simplewebauthn), JWT, RSA-4096, AES-256-GCM, RBAC, GDPR compliance, Helmet, express-rate-limit

### Payments & Integrations
Razorpay (UPI/Card/Wallet/COD), Brevo (Email), Cloudinary, Firebase Cloud Messaging, Piston API

### Tools & Methods
Git, npm workspaces, CI/CD pipelines, microservice architecture, circuit breaker pattern, CRDT algorithms, E2E encryption, PWA (Workbox), i18n (i18next), BullMQ job queues
